purpose: Stop version-line expansion and make Node / Area / Relation / Path / WorldEvent / WorldState the only long-lived factual core of the project.

professionalJudgement.primaryRisk: abstraction drift and build pipeline non-determinism

authoritativeLayers.description: Single source of truth for world facts and permissions.
Deterministic world behavior that works without AI.
World, universe, civilization and scene language are presentation projections, not new factual cores.

blockedWork: Do not add V11, R9, or another expansion line before production build and kernel consolidation are stable.
Do not introduce a second Node / Area / Relation / WorldState factual model in components or feature folders.
Do not mark artifact verification as clean production-ready proof.
Do not let AI suggestions publish, delete, overwrite originals, or change visibility without owner review.
allowedNextWork: Fix deterministic next build / CI exit.
Split oversized package scripts into core, release, legacy groups.
Collapse duplicated dynamic universe layers into one route-aware shell.
Move scattered world facts back into data/domain JSON and src/lib/types.ts.
Create preview smoke evidence and owner signoff evidence.

requiredBeforeReleaseReady: CI green on a fresh checkout
